## DataSourceValueType type

Gets the value type for a registered data source.

If the source has an `id` property, that becomes the value type. Otherwise, defaults to `string`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare type DataSourceValueType<Source extends string> = Source extends keyof DataSourceRegistry ? DataSourceRegistry[Source] extends {
    id: infer ID;
} ? ID : string : string;
```
**References:** [DataSourceRegistry](./formspec.datasourceregistry.md)
